{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Starkeeper’s Lance
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Starkeeper’s Lance]] is a technique from a [[Path]] that compresses [[sword]] and lightning madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
